parameters.query:
SELECT
  ts.session_id,
  ts.dialog_id,
  ts.employee_id,
  ts.state,
  ts.context,
  ar.result AS analysis
FROM training_sessions ts
JOIN analysis_results ar ON ar.dialog_id = ts.dialog_id
WHERE ts.session_id = '{{ $json.body.session_id }}'::uuid
  AND ts.dialog_id = '{{ $json.body.dialog_id }}'::uuid;

INSERT INTO employee_memory (
  employee_id, error_code, occurrence_count, last_training_at, coaching_notes
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.employee_id }}',
  '{{ $json.error_code }}',
  1,
  NOW(),
  '{{ $json.notes_escaped }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (employee_id, error_code) DO UPDATE SET
  occurrence_count = employee_memory.occurrence_count + 1,
  last_training_at = NOW(),
  coaching_notes = EXCLUDED.coaching_notes;

UPDATE dialogs SET status = 'coaching_done', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE dialog_id = '{{ $json.dialog_id }}'::uuid;
